response.global_analysis: The audio consists of a dialogue segment (00:00-01:44) between Akai Haato and Haachama, followed by a performance of the song 'Oningyou' (01:44-end). The audio phonetically matches the provided reference JSON lyrics for the song portion. Dialogue was transcribed from scratch and translated contextually. For the song, on-screen lyrics were used to ensure spelling accuracy, including the stylized text at the end. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal audio waveform.

subtitles.original: ちゃま！はあちゃまっちゃま！はあちゃまだよ！
こうやって対話するのは初めてだよね。
subtitles.english: This is the first time we've conversed like this.

subtitles.original: さっき歌ってた『感触』最高だったよ！
subtitles.english: The 'Feeling' you sang earlier was awesome!

subtitles.original: なんか大人っぽくなったね。
実は最近旅をすることが増えまして、
subtitles.english: Actually, I've been traveling more lately,

subtitles.original: そこで新しい自分を見つけて、ちょっぴり大人っぽい曲にチャレンジしてみました。
subtitles.english: and after finding a new side of myself, I tried challenging a slightly more mature song.

subtitles.original: ほう！特に好きな歌詞とかはある？
subtitles.english: Oh! Are there any lyrics you especially like?

subtitles.original: はい。「もう一度もう一度と何度思ったでしょう」という歌詞がありまして、
subtitles.english: Yes. There are lyrics that go, 'How many times have I thought, one more time, one more time...'

subtitles.original: 出会った景色や人の温もりを思いながら、すごく感情移入しました。
subtitles.english: thinking about the sights I've seen and the warmth of people, I really put my emotions into it.

subtitles.original: 今日リリース予定なので、みんなもたくさん聴いてね！
subtitles.english: It's scheduled for release today, so everyone, please listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: そしてそして！デュエットで『正しくなれない』歌ったよ！どうだった？
subtitles.english: And, and! We sang 'Can't Be Right' as a duet! How was it?

subtitles.original: 今までの記憶とか葛藤を振り返りながらでね、すごく心に沁みましたね。
subtitles.english: Looking back on past memories and struggles, it really resonated deep in my heart.

subtitles.original: はあとちゃんはさ、ずっと塞ぎ込んで、全然はあちゃまのこと見向きもしないんだもん！
subtitles.english: I mean, Haato-chan was always moping and wouldn't even look Haachama's way!

subtitles.original: そんなことないけど…ごめんね。
subtitles.english: That's not true, but... I'm sorry.

subtitles.original: でもお互い知って、分かり合えたからよかったなって思うよ。
subtitles.english: But I'm glad we could get to know and understand each other.

subtitles.original: そんな二人の家族写真を、今回は撮ってもらいました！
subtitles.english: We had a family photo of the two of us taken this time!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！二人の仲良しの証！
subtitles.english: Yay! A testament to how close we are!

subtitles.original: はい。B2タペストリーになっております！
subtitles.english: Yes. It's been made into a B2 tapestry!

subtitles.original: はあちゃま行くよ！あ、うん！せーの！
subtitles.english: Haachama's going! Ah, yeah! One, two!

subtitles.original: グッズ！グッズ！ゲットしてください！
subtitles.english: Goods! Goods! Please get the goods!

subtitles.original: ねえ見て お気に入りの、
世界に一つの、お人形さん
subtitles.english: one and only doll in the world.

subtitles.original: 顔も性格も、違ったけど
subtitles.english: Our faces and personalities were different, but

subtitles.original: ずっとみんな、なかよし。

subtitles.english: When I was taught what "pain" is,

subtitles.original: 私にもできた 恩返し
subtitles.english: I was also able to return the favor.

subtitles.original: いつもそばにいて ほしい、よね。
subtitles.english: I always want you by my side, right?

subtitles.original: 私にしてくれたように。
subtitles.english: just like you did for me.
Even the parts that are a little frayed
Even if it's a little misshapen,

subtitles.original: 大切な 家族たちなの。
ねえ見て お気に入りの、
世界に一つの、お人形さん
subtitles.english: one and only doll in the world.

subtitles.original: 顔も性格も、違ったけど
subtitles.english: Our faces and personalities were different, but

subtitles.original: ずっとみんな、なかよし。
私にしてくれたように、
subtitles.english: Just like you did for me,
even the parts that are a little frayed
Even if it's a little misshapen,
